name: Crawlers.fr
description: SEO & GEO audit platform — score, analyze and auto-fix your site visibility in Google and AI engines. Covers classic SEO, Generative Engine Optimization (GEO), and Local SEO in one tool.
author: Adrien de Volontat

authentication.description: Supabase auth token from a Crawlers.fr Pro Agency account

tools.name: check_geo_score
tools.description: Calculate the GEO (Generative Engine Optimization) score for a domain. Returns a 0-100 score measuring how well the site is optimized for AI engines like ChatGPT, Gemini, Perplexity and Claude.

tools.name: check_llm_visibility
tools.description: Check how visible a domain is across major LLMs (ChatGPT, Gemini, Perplexity, Claude, Mistral, Llama). Returns citation rates, mention frequency, and recommendation scores.

tools.name: check_ai_crawlers
tools.description: Analyze which AI bots are crawling a site (GPTBot, ClaudeBot, Google-Extended, Bytespider, etc.). Returns robots.txt analysis, detected bot activity, and blocking recommendations.

tools.name: expert_seo_audit
tools.description: Run a comprehensive 200-point SEO audit on a URL. Covers technical SEO, on-page optimization, structured data, Core Web Vitals, accessibility, and security. Returns detailed scores and actionable recommendations.

tools.name: strategic_ai_audit
tools.description: Run a strategic AI-powered audit combining SEO signals, GEO readiness, competitive positioning, and content gap analysis. Uses LLM reasoning to produce prioritized recommendations.

tools.name: generate_corrective_code
tools.description: Generate JavaScript corrective code to fix SEO/GEO issues detected by an audit. The code can be deployed via Google Tag Manager or injected directly. Returns deployable JS snippets with dry-run capability.

audit_id.description: ID of a previous audit to base corrections on (optional)

tools.name: dry_run_script
tools.description: Test a corrective script in sandbox mode before deploying. Returns simulated DOM changes, potential conflicts, and safety assessment.

script_id.description: ID of the script to test

target_url.description: URL to simulate the script on

tools.name: calculate_cocoon_logic
tools.description: Generate a semantic cocoon (cocon sémantique) structure using TF-IDF analysis. Maps topical clusters, internal linking opportunities, and content hierarchy for SEO authority building.

tools.name: measure_audit_impact
tools.description: Measure the real-world impact of deployed SEO/GEO corrections at T+30, T+60, and T+90 days. Correlates audit recommendations with actual traffic and ranking changes from GSC and GA4 data.

tools.name: wordpress_sync
tools.description: Inject corrective code and SEO fixes directly into a WordPress site via the Crawlers Bridge CMS plugin. Supports safe deployment with rollback capability.

tracked_site_id.description: Tracked site ID with active CMS connection

tools.name: fetch_serp_kpis
tools.description: Fetch weekly SERP KPIs for a tracked domain: keyword rankings, position changes, estimated traffic, visibility score, and competitor comparison.

tools.name: calculate_ias
tools.description: Calculate the Strategic Alignment Index (IAS) — a proprietary score measuring how well a site's content strategy aligns with search intent, AI engine expectations, and competitive positioning.
